agreed_facts.topic: OpenAIService already supports image attachments via OpenAILocalImage
agreed_facts.implication: Reuse the existing service, do not build a parallel client.

agreed_facts.topic: Image-provider gate is per-group DB-backed today (image_provider_enabled)
Existing endpoint is multi-image, returns slug, 400 on disable
Existing orchestrator persists first image as original.webp cover
RecipeService.create_one is the canonical creation entry
Canonical safe-upload pattern: get_temporary_path() + uuid4() filename
Pydantic v2 strict parse via OpenAIBase.parse_openai_response
Prompts are plain .txt under prompts/{general,recipes}/ with dotted-name lookup + traversal guard
OpenAIService.get_response catch-all leaks str(e) of upstream exception
OpenAIBase._process_response DEBUG-logs the full raw response on parse failure
agreed_facts.risk: Raw LLM output reaches DEBUG logs even when caller expects no leakage. MUST be sanitized for the new endpoint.

agreed_facts.topic: RateLimitError exists but is never translated to HTTP 429
agreed_facts.citation: mealie/core/exceptions.py:57-62; controller handle_exceptions has no 429 branch (recipe_crud_routes.py:90-125)

agreed_facts.topic: No body-size limit, no MIME magic-sniff, no per-user rate-limiter exist in the repo
agreed_facts.citation: pyproject.toml has Pillow (line 10) + openai (line 43), no python-magic or filetype; routes have no size/magic checks

agreed_facts.topic: Only OPENAI_CUSTOM_PROMPT_DIR survives in AppSettings; other OPENAI_* migrated to DB rows by PR #7650
system/user message separation is already structurally correct in _get_raw_response
Only en-US locale file may be modified; others Crowdin-managed

resolved_conflicts.resolution: Single image per intent §1; existing multi-image variant gets replaced (frontend break documented in NC).
Persist immediately (mirrors /create/url); review loop is the front-end edit page.

resolved_conflicts.topic: MIME sniff library: python-magic vs filetype vs Pillow.verify
resolved_conflicts.resolution: filetype==1.2.0 (pure-python, ~30KB, no native dep). Pillow .verify still runs inside OpenAILocalImage for defense-in-depth.
in-process asyncio.Lock-guarded dict; emit startup warning when UVICORN_WORKERS > 1; DB migration deferred.

blocking_decisions.default: Persist immediately and return full Recipe (mirrors /create/url).
in-process dict; log startup warning when UVICORN_WORKERS > 1.

self_concerns.concern: python-magic OS dep avoided by filetype
Rate-limit per-process; multi-worker under-counts by N
Prompt-injection mitigation is textual only; rely on cleaner.clean for HTML/script scrubbing
60s timeout re-introduction reverses PR #6227; long vision calls may legitimately exceed it
image (single) vs images (plural) is a public-API break; front-end coordination required
